records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/, adj. neut. pl., headless. See Acephal.]

defs: That division of the Mollusca which includes the bivalve shells, like the clams and oysters; -- so called because they have no evident head. Formerly the group included the Tunicata, Brachiopoda, and sometimes the Bryozoa. See Mollusca.
